meta.project_name: Fortuna Budget App - Account Type Feature

idea.title: Account Type Classification
idea.description: Each account (card/bank account) should have a type: cash, debit, credit card, loan, or stocks. When adding a transaction the user selects which account it belongs to (already implemented). The account type should be visible throughout the UI.
features: Add account type field to Account model (cash, debit, credit_card, loan, stocks)
Type dropdown when adding account in Settings
Show type label on account cards in Accounts screen
Show type in Account Detail screen header
Show type label on account selector chips in Add Transaction screen
out_of_scope: Changing the transaction date/time picker (already done in v2.13.0)

prd.problem: Users can add multiple accounts but have no way to classify them by type (cash, debit, credit card, loan, stocks). This makes it hard to understand the nature of each account at a glance.
prd.solution: Each account gets a type at creation time. The type is displayed alongside the account name throughout the UI: Accounts list, Account Detail header, and Add Transaction account selector.
screens_affected: Settings Screen (add account dialog + account list)
Add Transaction Screen (account chips show type)

features.name: Account Model Type Field
features.description: Add 'type' enum/string field to Account class with values: cash, debit, credit_card, loan, stocks. Default to 'cash' for existing accounts.

features.name: Persist Account Type
features.description: Update Account encode/decode and AccountSettingsModel to persist the type field. Migration: existing accounts without type default to 'cash'.

features.name: Settings Type Dropdown
features.description: When adding an account in Settings, show a type dropdown/selector. Default to 'debit' for new non-cash accounts.

features.name: Accounts Screen Type Label
features.description: Show type chip/label on each account card in the Accounts list screen.

features.name: Account Detail Type Badge
features.description: Show account type badge in the Account Detail screen header next to the account name.

features.name: Add Transaction Type Indicator
features.description: Show type label on each account chip in the Add Transaction screen selector.

out_of_scope: Date/time picker on transactions (already in v2.13.0)

Account.new_field: type (String) — one of: cash, debit, credit_card, loan, stocks
Account.migration: Existing encoded accounts (id|name|iconKey) — on decode, default type to 'cash'. New encode: id|name|iconKey|type

items.title: Add type field to Account model
items.description: Add 'type' field to Account class (String, one of: cash, debit, credit_card, loan, stocks). Update encode/decode to handle migration. Default existing accounts to 'cash'.

items.title: Update AccountSettingsModel for type
items.description: Update addAccount to accept type parameter. Update _load migration for old format. Add type to icon key mapping based on type.

items.title: Settings screen type dropdown
items.description: Add type dropdown to add-account form in SettingsScreen. Show type chip next to each account in the list.

items.title: Accounts screen type label
items.description: Show type chip on AccountBalanceCard widget for each account in the Accounts list.

items.title: Account detail type badge
items.description: Show account type badge/chip in AccountDetailScreen header next to account name.

items.title: Add transaction type indicator
items.description: Show type label on account selector chips in AddTransactionScreen _buildAccountSection.
